---
schema: qual/card@1
id: CPT-NORMALITY
kind: concept
title: Normality is not transitive
classification:
  areas:
  - algebra
  topics:
  - groups
relations: []
review: draft
---

::: concept
$H \normal K \normal G$ does not give $H \normal G$. Normality is a statement
about a subgroup *relative to* an ambient group, not an intrinsic property.
:::
